message:
test(proptest): reconstruct_pct_change_axis1_dataframe helper

crates/fp-conformance/tests/proptest_properties.rs (+158)
  * New `reconstruct_pct_change_axis1_dataframe(df, periods) ->
    DataFrame` helper mirroring the existing
    `reconstruct_pct_change_series` helper but operating across
    columns (axis=1) instead of rows. Pairs with
    `DataFrame::pct_change(axis=1)` for the parity check.
  * Plumbing:
      - call `df.diff_axis1(periods)` and `df.shift_axis1(periods)`
        for the delta / previous pair;
      - preserve the input column order via
        `df.column_names().into_iter().cloned().collect::<Vec<_>>()`
        so the reconstructed DataFrame has the same layout;
      - iterate each column by name, zip `diff_col.values()` with
        `shifted_col.values()`, and elementwise-apply
        `reconstruct_pct_change_scalar` (the single-cell helper
        already defined in the axis-0 version).
  * Used by new property tests asserting
    `df.pct_change(axis=1, periods=n)` matches the reconstruction
    for n ∈ {-2, -1, 1, 2}, including NaN-propagation rules.
  * All additions are `#[cfg(test)]`; no production-code change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
